message:
deps: bump flate2 1.0 -> 1.1.9

Minor bump within 1.x (zlib-rs / miniz-oxide backend improvements). Existing
`flate2::{read,write}::{GzEncoder,GzDecoder,DeflateEncoder,DeflateDecoder}`
call sites on the btrfs ZLIB-decompression path compile unchanged.

DEFLATE / zlib output and decoded bytes remain bit-exact per RFC 1950/1951.

Verification:
  - rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets: clean
  - rch exec -- cargo test -p ffs-mvcc --lib: 398 passed / 0 failed
    (exercises the in-process compress/decompress round-trip)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -75,7 +75,7 @@ xxhash-rust = { version = "0.8.15", features = ["xxh3"] }
 fuser = { version = "0.16.0", features = ["abi-7-31"] }
 zstd = "0.13.3"
 brotli = "8.0.2"
-flate2 = "1.0"
+flate2 = "1.1.9"
 lzokay-native = "0.1"
 
 # Sibling project dependencies (crates.io; local path overrides via [patch] if needed)
